ModDescription: Transmarvel, fixed: sigil rolls are always one of 41 chase sigils (13 top V+ + all 28 character Warpath+, equal odds); wrightstones always tier-3 Transmarveled; the random 2nd trait on + sigils only rolls from a curated 18-trait list (no junk resistances); and every Chaos+ quest clear grants guaranteed Transmarvel Vouchers (Chaos/Chaos+ x1, Chaos++ x2, Infinity x3). Built for Endless Ragnarok 2.0. Curios untouched.
